verdict_reason: The briefing pack still misses hard substrate-prep acceptance requirements: the adversarial corpus is promised as 22 inputs but only contains 21, and the upload block depends on fixture PDFs that are documented as not committed and are absent from the repo.

findings.description: The file is titled and referenced as a 22-input adversarial corpus, but it only contains inputs #1 through #21 and the end section says 'After all 21 inputs.' This fails the GREEN criterion requiring a 22-input adversarial corpus.

The briefing lists fixture PDFs at tests/v6/fixtures/walkthrough/1.8_*.pdf as prerequisites while saying they are not yet committed; the referenced walkthrough fixture directory is absent, so the F3 upload block cannot be executed repeatably.

The failure example uses 'INPUT #14: Reference uploaded doc in query' and expects uploaded-PDF citation grounding, but test input #14 is the audit bundle export check and the corpus says upload-as-evidence is out of scope for this walkthrough.
The scope line lists F4 alongside F1, F2, F3, and F15, while the acceptance bar and feature table orient the evaluator only to F1/F2/F3/F15.
